name: HWR_MENTOR_B
description: This Table stores the details of the Mentor

columns.Name: MENTOR_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Unique Identifier of the Mentor

columns.Name: MENTOR_GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Mentor's Global Profile Id

columns.Name: MENTOR_FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Mentor's Fusion Profile Id

columns.Name: MENTOREE_GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the mentoree global profile Id.

columns.Name: MENTOREE_FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the mentoree Fusion profile Id.

columns.Name: MENTORSHIP_STATUS
columns.Comments: This is current staus of mentor.

columns.Name: METRIC_NAME
columns.Comments: This store mentor's  metric name. This could be one or multiple.

columns.Name: MENTOR_MENTOREE_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: This will store the communication between the mentor and mentee.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
